things.name: Surfers Paradise Beach
things.description: Iconic golden sand beach backed by a glittering skyline, the heart of the Gold Coast

things.name: Theme Parks
things.description: Movie World, Dreamworld, Sea World and Wet'n'Wild - Australia's theme park capital

things.name: Lamington National Park
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage subtropical rainforest with ancient hoop pines and waterfalls

things.name: Burleigh Heads National Park
things.description: Volcanic headland park with rainforest walk and world-class point break surfing

things.name: Currumbin Wildlife Sanctuary
things.description: Wildlife park famous for rainbow lorikeet feeding and koala encounters

things.name: Main Beach & Marina Mirage
things.description: Exclusive shopping and dining district at the gateway to the Broadwater

things.name: Q1 Tower SkyPoint
things.description: Observation deck on the 77th floor of the Southern Hemisphere's tallest residential tower

things.name: Coolangatta
things.description: Laid-back surf town on the NSW border with the legendary Snapper Rocks point break

things.name: Springbrook National Park
things.description: Ancient Gondwana rainforest with Natural Bridge glowworm cave and waterfalls

things.name: Broadwater Parklands
things.description: Waterfront park with kayaking, stand-up paddle boarding and Gold Coast Aquatic Centre
